ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the project */,
  "teacher_acct_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the teacher who posted the project */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the school where the project is based */,
  "school_ncesid" TEXT /* National Center for Education Statistics (NCES) ID of the school */,
  "school_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school location */,
  "school_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school location */,
  "school_city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "school_state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "school_metro" TEXT /* Metropolitan area classification of the school */,
  "school_district" TEXT /* District where the school is located */,
  "school_county" TEXT /* County where the school is located */,
  "school_charter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school is a charter school */,
  "school_magnet" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school is a magnet school */,
  "teacher_prefix" TEXT /* Prefix of the teacher's name */,
  "primary_focus_subject" TEXT /* Primary subject of the project */,
  "primary_focus_area" TEXT /* Primary focus area of the project */,
  "secondary_focus_subject" TEXT /* Secondary subject of the project */,
  "secondary_focus_area" TEXT /* Secondary focus area of the project */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resources requested */,
  "poverty_level" TEXT /* Poverty level of the school */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the project */,
  "total_price_including_optional_support" REAL /* Total cost of the project including optional support */,
  "students_reached" INTEGER /* Number of students the project will impact */,
  "eligible_double_your_impact_match" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is eligible for a double impact match */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date the project was posted */,
  "date_fully_funded" TEXT /* Date the project was fully funded */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., posted, in-progress, fully-funded, completed) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image related to the project */,
  "project_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video related to the project */,
  "project_impact_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the expected impact of the project */,
  "project_completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was completed */,
  "project_funding_goal" REAL /* Total funding goal for the project */,
  "project_current_funding" REAL /* Current amount of funding received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_teacher_acct_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_acct_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_acct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_acct_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "teacher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the school where the teacher works */,
  "teacher_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the teacher */,
  "teacher_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a profile photo of the teacher */,
  "teacher_social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "teacher_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  "teacher_specializations" TEXT /* JSON array of subjects or areas of specialization */,
  "teacher_past_projects_count" INTEGER /* Number of past projects the teacher has managed */,
  "teacher_total_funding_raised" REAL /* Total amount of funding raised by the teacher */,
  "teacher_average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by donors and other teachers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_acct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_ncesid" TEXT /* National Center for Education Statistics (NCES) ID of the school */,
  "school_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school location */,
  "school_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school location */,
  "school_city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "school_state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "school_metro" TEXT /* Metropolitan area classification of the school */,
  "school_district" TEXT /* District where the school is located */,
  "school_county" TEXT /* County where the school is located */,
  "school_charter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school is a charter school */,
  "school_magnet" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school is a magnet school */,
  "school_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a profile photo or logo of the school */,
  "school_website_url" TEXT /* URL to the school's official website */,
  "school_social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "school_student_count" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "school_teacher_count" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers in the school */,
  "school_funding_raised" REAL /* Total amount of funding raised by the school */,
  "school_average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by donors and other teachers */,
  "school_accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the school */,
  "school_curriculum_focus" TEXT /* JSON array of subjects or areas of focus in the school's curriculum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the donor */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the donor */,
  "donor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the donor */,
  "donor_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the donor */,
  "donor_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a profile photo of the donor */,
  "donor_social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "donor_donation_history" TEXT /* JSON array of past donations (project_id, amount, date) */,
  "donor_total_donated" REAL /* Total amount of money donated by the donor */,
  "donor_average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by teachers and other donors */,
  "donor_favored_projects" TEXT /* JSON array of project types or subjects the donor prefers to fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_funding" (
  "funding_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the funding contribution */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the project being funded */,
  "donor_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the donor making the contribution */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "funding_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding (e.g., pending, completed, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_funding_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_funding_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_resources" (
  "resource_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the resource */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the project requesting the resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource */,
  "resource_cost" REAL /* Cost of the resource */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "resource_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource requested */,
  "resource_status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., requested, delivered, in-use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_resources_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_impact" (
  "impact_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the impact record */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the project */,
  "student_count" INTEGER /* Number of students impacted */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date the impact was recorded */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact (e.g., academic, behavioral, social) */,
  "impact_metrics" TEXT /* JSON array of specific metrics used to measure impact (e.g., test scores, attendance rates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_impact_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reviews" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the review */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the project being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_type" TEXT /* Type of the reviewer (e.g., teacher, donor) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_helpfulness_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating how helpful the review was */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reviews_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_acct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the update */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the project being updated */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was posted */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., progress, completion, setback) */,
  "update_media_urls" TEXT /* JSON array of media URLs (e.g., photos, videos) related to the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
